news.headline: E Ink and AUO Display Plus to create joint venture for large ePaper modules, boosting ecosystem with tech & manufacturing.
news.summary: Leveraging the collective knowledge in ePaper technology and smart manufacturing is driving the enhancement of ecosystem development. This collaboration merges expertise in ePaper technology with smart manufacturing practices to foster growth. The strategic partnership aims to capitalize on the strengths of both fields to propel ecosystem development. This initiative brings together professionals with specialized skills in ePaper technology and smart manufacturing to fortify the ecosystem. By combining these areas of expertise, the collaboration seeks to achieve significant advancements. The fusion of talents in ePaper technology and smart manufacturing plays a pivotal role in boosting ecosystem development. Synergizing the proficiency in these domains is integral to advancing the ecosystem in a comprehensive manner. The merger underscores the importance of utilizing the unique abilities of individuals versed in ePaper technology and smart manufacturing for ecosystem growth. This partnership represents a significant step towards leveraging the potential of ePaper technology and smart manufacturing in propelling ecosystem development.

news.headline: Cory Booker's lengthy speech, lasting 25 hours, successfully drew attention.
ApolloMD awarded Top Workplaces USA 2025 by Energage after 15 years of surveys, recognizing over 20 organizations.
news.summary: Atlanta-based company ApolloMD was recently honored with the 2025 Top Workplaces USA award from Energage, an organization dedicated to creating and recognizing top workplace environments. With over 15 years of experience in surveying 20 organizations, the award is a testament to ApolloMD's commitment to excellence in employee satisfaction and organizational culture.

news.headline: PCL Construction ranked 91st in Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For 2025 by Great Place To Work.
news.summary: PCL Construction has been honored as one of the Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For® in 2025 by Great Place To Work® and Fortune magazine. This marks PCL's 16th inclusion in the prestigious list, with the company ranking 91st this year. This recognition highlights PCL's ongoing commitment to providing an exceptional workplace environment.

news.headline: Tesla Deliveries 1Q $TSLA
Masimo to present at 24th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference on April 9, 2025, 2:15 pm ET. Live webcast on website.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, Masimo (NASDAQ: MASI) disclosed its involvement in the upcoming 24th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference scheduled for April 9, 2025, at 2:15 p.m. Eastern time. The management team will be participating. The event will be broadcasted live on Masimo's website, www.masimo.com. A post-conference replay will also be made available. Masimo, listed as NASDAQ: MASI, is a worldwide medical technology enterprise specializing in the development and manufacturing of a broad range of healthcare solutions.

news.headline: Adobe launches Generative Extend in Premiere Pro, using AI to quickly generate and extend video & audio clips. AI-powered Media Intelligence helps find clips in large amounts of footage in seconds. Safe for commercial use.
news.summary: Adobe (Nasdaq: ADBE) has introduced Generative Extend in Premiere Pro, utilizing AI technology to instantly expand video and audio clips. This feature, powered by the Firefly Video Model and deemed safe for commercial applications, allows editors to elongate content in 4K resolution and various orientations. Additionally, Adobe launched AI-powered Media Intelligence to facilitate quick searches for specific clips within massive amounts of footage. The innovative tools aim to streamline the editing process and enhance efficiency for users.

news.headline: Informatica (NYSE: INFA) launches new AI-driven data management tools to boost AI adoption & enhance data access.
news.summary: Informatica, a leader in AI-powered enterprise cloud data management, unveiled new data management innovations aimed at facilitating access to AI-ready data across enterprises. These advancements, which leverage the CLAIRE® AI engine, are featured in the Intelligent Data Management Cloud™ (IDMC). They are designed to streamline the process of making data relevant, responsible, and robust, thereby enabling organizations to pursue AI projects with increased assurance and ease.

news.headline: Object First introduces three new Ootbi appliances (20TB, 40TB, 432TB), providing immutable backup storage for capacities up to 7PB.
news.summary: In Beverly, Mass., Object First, the company behind Ootbi (Out-of-the-Box-Immutability) introduced three new Ootbi appliances. These appliances come in capacities of 20 TB, 40 TB, and 432 TB. Organizations of various sizes, from small businesses to large enterprises, can utilize Ootbi's ransomware-proof backup storage for data resilience needs, ranging from 20 TB to 7 PB. Additionally, recent firmware updates bring a 20% increase in performance.

news.headline: Backblaze & PureNodal partner for AI, HPC workloads. Backblaze (Nasdaq: BLZE) to deliver modern cloud solutions with PureNodal for enterprises.
news.summary: A collaboration has been unveiled between Backblaze, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLZE) and PureNodal to offer a new cloud storage solution tailored for AI and high-performance compute (HPC). Backblaze, known for its modern cloud storage services, and PureNodal, a specialized cloud platform for AI and HPC tasks, are teaming up to provide efficient and cost-effective solutions for large-scale corporate workloads like AI model training and data analytics. This partnership aims to deliver high-performance capabilities for tasks such as media rendering.

news.headline: Strata Identity CEO to speak at CyberArk Impact 2025 conference on identity resilience, focusing on avoiding single points of failure in identity provider solutions for continuous access during outages. Characters: 209
news.summary: In Boulder, Colorado, individuals at an upcoming event will discover strategies to reduce single points of failure in identity provider systems, safeguarding uninterrupted access during unexpected downtimes. This event aims to educate attendees on maintaining seamless operations in the face of disruptions, emphasizing the importance of reliable access to cloud identity and access management (IAM) solutions.

news.headline: Runtime Ventures debuts with $32M fund for seed stage cybersecurity startups, founded by David Endler.
news.summary: An Arlington, Virginia, and Austin, Texas-based venture capital fund, Runtime Ventures, has introduced its inaugural fund with a capital investment of $32 million. Specializing in seed-stage cybersecurity investments, the fund aims to aid and foster creative cybersecurity startups at the pre-seed and seed stages. Co-founded by General Partner David Endler, who has experience in establishing cybersecurity startups like SpyCloud and Jumpshot, Runtime Ventures is committed to supporting the growth of new ventures in the cybersecurity sector.

news.headline: Spire introduces Pay with Spire, a new solution powered by Discover® Network for seamless payments at the point of sale.
news.summary: Spire, a leading payment solution for daily expenses, has announced the launch of its latest Pay with Spire platform, which utilizes the Discover® Network for transactions.

news.headline: MeridianLink helps Solarity Credit Union with efficient mortgage lending solution in Costa Mesa, California. #MLNK #digitallending
news.summary: MeridianLink, based in Costa Mesa, California, has announced the successful implementation of MeridianLink® Mortgage for Solarity Credit Union. This digital lending solution is designed to streamline the mortgage process for Solarity Credit Union members, making it more efficient and user-friendly. This partnership aims to enhance the lending experience for members by leveraging advanced technology.

news.headline: Molson Coors nominates Chris Cocks as an independent director; election at Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 14, 2025.
news.summary: In Golden, Colorado and Montreal, the Molson Coors Beverage Company revealed that Christian “Chris” Cocks has been nominated as an independent Class B director for election at the company’s Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 14, 2025. Cocks, currently the Chief Executive Officer of Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ: HAS), a prominent games, IP, and toy company, brings a wealth of experience as a consumer goods executive. This appointment comes as part of the Molson Coors' Board of Directors' strategy to enhance its leadership team. Look out for updates on this development at the upcoming shareholders meeting.

news.headline: CaryHealth ranked #1 on Inc.'s 2025 list of fastest-growing companies in Mid-Atlantic region.
news.summary: A digital health technology company based in Washington, CaryHealth, has been ranked as the number one company on the annual Inc. Regionals: Mid-Atlantic list. This recognition solidifies CaryHealth's position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Inspectorio partners with SLCP to become a Passive Accredited Host, enhancing social compliance in labor practices.
news.summary: A recent collaboration has been unveiled between Inspectorio and the Social and Labor Convergence Program (SLCP) in Minneapolis. The partnership aims to strengthen cooperation between the two entities for better operational efficiency and enhanced impact. This initiative brings together Inspectorio's expertise in inspection and transparency with SLCP's focus on promoting social and labor standards within supply chains. This alliance is set to benefit a wide range of stakeholders by ensuring compliance with ethical practices.

news.headline: Figlia introduces new flavor Sole, a non-alcoholic aperitivo with tart lemon, ripe peach, basil in a sunny bottle.
news.summary: In New York, non-alcoholic aperitivo brand Figlia has introduced its latest flavor, Sole, marking its first new flavor release. Sole features a bright golden color and a refreshing combination of tangy lemon, sweet peach, and fragrant basil, enhanced by subtle botanicals. Positioned as a perfect choice for warm days and various occasions, Sole offers a vibrant and crisp alternative to Figlia's signature Fiore, known for its comforting clove undertones. Crafted from entirely natural ingredients, Sole brings a dynamic and lively addition to Figlia's product line.

news.headline: Aera Technology increases customer inventory performance by 20% through real-time decision intelligence in supply chain.
news.summary: Based in Mountain View, California, Aera specializes in detecting and managing changes in demand and supply within enterprises. The company's technology enables it to make instant decisions to enhance and streamline supply chain operations efficiently.

news.headline: NMI, LANDI, ID TECH, TRG, and Paysley team up to launch a new mPOS solution, the LANDI DUET, at ETA TRANSACT 2025.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, at ETA TRANSACT 2025, NMI®, LANDI, ID TECH®, TRG, and Paysley have introduced a cutting-edge mobile point-of-sale (mPOS) solution called the LANDI DUET. This new solution is based on SmartPOS architecture, catering to the increasing need in the market for seamless, fully integrated payments while on the move. The LANDI DUET, a comprehensive mPOS offering, merges top-notch hardware, software, and fulfilment services into a convenient package. The DUET comprises LANDI’s M20 mobile device combined with ID TECH technology, creating a powerful all-in-one solution for businesses looking to enhance their payment capabilities.

news.headline: Maxwell Street invests in Port Jersey Logistics, a leader in temperature-controlled logistics, supporting expansion efforts.
news.summary: Maxwell Street Capital Partners, based in Chicago, disclosed their investment in Port Jersey Logistics, a prominent provider of temperature-controlled logistics services to the food and beverage sector. The partnership involves work with Port Jersey's senior management team, who will remain in charge of operations. This collaboration enables Port Jersey to access more capital for acquisitions and receive strategic guidance as they focus on expanding their services in the industry.

news.headline: Mesa partners with Lowe's, providing cardmembers annual statement credits in a unique collaboration.
news.summary: A unique partnership has been established in Austin, Texas, providing Mesa cardmembers with exclusive benefits. Through this initiative, cardmembers can now enjoy annual statement credits when shopping at Lowe's stores. This collaboration marks a pioneering venture that aims to enhance customer experience and drive engagement.

news.headline: Fifth Third is hosting free homeownership summits to help low to moderate income borrowers achieve their dream of owning a home.
news.summary: In Cincinnati, Fifth Third (NASDAQ: FITB) is launching a series of free educational summits to assist Americans in achieving their dream of homeownership. While owning a home is a common aspiration for many, a rising number of individuals believe it may never happen for them. The Homeownership Summit Series aims to eliminate obstacles to homeownership and empower more individuals to fulfill this dream. This initiative is especially targeted towards low to moderate income borrowers, providing them with valuable insights on cost-saving benefits and essential information to make their dream of owning a home a reality.

news.headline: Sky Zone expands in Texas with new Frisco venue and 13 franchise locations sold. New 40,000 sq ft location at 3333 Preston Rd.
news.summary: Sky Zone®, a pioneer in trampoline park entertainment, has unveiled its latest location in Frisco, Texas at 3333 Preston Rd, Suite 1500. This new 40,000-square-foot park showcases the brand’s updated next-gen branding and guest experience. It is the fourth Sky Zone location in Texas and the second in the Dallas region. This opening is part of the brand’s strategic expansion in the Lone Star State.

news.headline: NTT DATA repurposes waste heat from Berlin data center for heating in development, supplying up to 8 MW of heating capacity.
news.summary: NTT DATA, a renowned global provider of digital business and technology services, has unveiled a waste heat recovery initiative at its Berlin 1 Data Center located in the Spandau region of Berlin. This project aims to offer heat for an upcoming residential and commercial project named “Das Neue Gartenfeld.” The plan involves supplying up to 8 MW of heating capacity from two data centers in Spandau to Quartierswerk Gartenfeld GmbH, a joint venture between the entities involved.

news.headline: Connected Investors® launches new AI-powered real estate investing platform in Agoura Hills, CA. Helps investors with property acquisition and funding.
news.summary: A new AI-powered real estate investing platform has been launched by Connected Investors in Agoura Hills, California. This innovative platform is designed to assist investors in simplifying the process of acquiring properties and securing funding.

news.headline: "LetMeFail program launches to redefine failure as path to resilience for students; aims to empower kids through setbacks. CHICAGO, April 2, 2025."
news.summary: Launching in Chicago on April 2, 2025, LetMeFail is a novel educational program aiming to revolutionize students' outlook on failure. This initiative encourages kids to embrace setbacks as opportunities for growth, learning, and development. In a society fixated on perfection, LetMeFail underlines the importance of resilience and adaptability in the face of challenges. The program seeks to impact a significant number of students, fostering a proactive approach towards failure across the educational landscape.

news.headline: OneOncology & Beacon Clinic partner to improve cancer care in Idaho, Beacon Clinic has 11 providers at two clinics.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in Nashville, Tennessee and Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, OneOncology, a national platform run by physicians supporting independent oncology practices, joined forces with Beacon Clinic, a physician-led multispecialty practice comprising 11 providers who care for patients at two clinics.

news.headline: Suffolk hires Erin Lovering as Chief People Officer to enhance employee experience and hiring. - 96 characters
news.summary: Boston-based construction company Suffolk has appointed Erin Lovering as its new Chief People Officer. Lovering, an experienced HR executive, will oversee all HR functions nationwide. She will collaborate with Suffolk's top executives to enhance the company's national brand visibility, improve employee experience, and facilitate sustainable growth. This move reflects Suffolk's dedication to innovation and growth in the construction industry.

news.headline: Obie rebrands for real estate investment insurance, focusing on clarity, speed, and trust in Chicago.
news.summary: In Chicago, a company previously known as Obie has undergone a rebranding to better align with its expanding involvement in real estate investment insurance. The rebranding efforts emphasize providing protection through clear, fast, and trustworthy services.

news.headline: Finance of America Reverse LLC promotes Jonathan Scarpati to Chief Production Officer to strengthen leadership in home equity financing.
news.summary: Plano, Texas-based Finance of America Reverse LLC, a prominent provider of home equity-based financing solutions for retirement, and a subdivision of Finance of America Companies Inc. (NYSE: FOA), shared the promotion of Jonathan Scarpati as the new Chief Production Officer. This move is viewed as a strategic one aimed at enhancing FOA's leadership within a crucial sector vital for the company's future growth strategies. Jonathan Scarpati's appointment to this key role is set to bolster efforts in making home equity more accessible.

news.headline: Interface invests in captured carbon material to meet climate goals. Incorporating carbon in manufacturing processes.
news.summary: Interface, a company based in Atlanta, has revealed plans to integrate captured carbon into its manufacturing operations in order to fulfill its ambitious climate goals. This move signifies a significant shift towards sustainable practices, with Interface utilizing captured carbon as a crucial raw material. The company's commitment to reducing its carbon footprint is underscored by this initiative, highlighting its dedication to environmental stewardship.

news.headline: NCCN's 2025 conference highlighted 30 years of impact, showcasing cancer care practices, new research, and workforce changes.
news.summary: The National Comprehensive Cancer Network recently marked its 30th year milestone by hosting a series of discussions in Orlando, Florida. The presentations focused on significant changes in cancer care practices, including treatment protocols and administrative procedures. Additionally, updates in research and alterations in the oncology workforce were highlighted to benefit the patients. The event served as a platform to review and acknowledge the advancements made over the past three decades in the fight against cancer.

news.headline: Prophetic completes seed funding led by Entrada Ventures, SilverCircle and Progression Fund for national expansion.
news.summary: A company headquartered in Portland has recently completed a round of seed funding. The funding was primarily led by Entrada Ventures and saw participation from SilverCircle and Progression Fund. This company, Prophetic, specializes in enhancing the real estate development analysis process through various means such as automated site planning, statewide development maps, and statewide zoning maps. The successful funding round marks a significant milestone for Prophetic as it aims to advance its innovative solutions in the real estate sector.

news.headline: SEKISUI Diagnostics launches Metrix® COVID/Flu Test for point-of-care and home test markets.
news.summary: In Burlington, Massachusetts, on April 2, 2025, SEKISUI Diagnostics, a renowned medical diagnostics provider, has introduced the Metrix® COVID/Flu Test. This test marks the second assay on the Metrix® Molecular Platform, designed for point-of-care and at-home use. The initiative follows the brand’s previous milestone in January 2024.

news.headline: John Lewis, Jr. from Shook, Hardy & Bacon joins Houston Pilots Board, governing authority for Houston Pilots Association.
news.summary: John Lewis, Jr., a partner at Shook, Hardy & Bacon, has recently been selected to join the Board of Pilot Commissioners for Harris County Ports in Houston, Texas. This board oversees the Houston Pilots Association, responsible for providing pilotage services in the area. Lewis's appointment signifies a significant addition to the governance of the association and highlights his expertise in the field. This move is expected to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of the port operations in Houston.

news.headline: Blenders Eyewear appoints Jack Gray as new CEO, bringing over 20 years of brand-building experience.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in San Diego, Blenders Eyewear, a prominent eyewear brand under Safilo Group, revealed the selection of Jack Gray as its latest Chief Executive Officer. Possessing close to twenty years of proficiency in enhancing and expanding international brands, Gray's appointment demonstrates a strategic move for the company.

news.headline: BlackBerry Q4 earnings beat estimates with revenue of $141.70M, adjusted earnings of $0.03. QNX revenue flat at $65.8M.
news.summary: In their recent fourth-quarter financial report, BlackBerry Ltd (NYSE:BB) announced revenue of $141.70 million, surpassing the predicted $132.83 million. Adjusted earnings for the quarter stood at $0.03 per share, higher than the estimated $0.01. Particularly noteworthy was the flat year-over-year growth of QNX (formerly known as IoT) revenue, which came in at $65.8 million, surpassing expectations. However, the segment's gross margin decreased by 200 basis points to 83%. On the other hand, Secure Communications (previously termed Cybersecurity) revenue outperformed guidance. For more details, visit a reliable financial news source.

news.headline: Marchex launches Engage for Service AI solution for auto dealerships to enhance customer engagement & boost revenue.
news.summary: In Seattle, Marchex (NASDAQ: MCHX) unveiled a new AI solution, Engage for Service, tailored for auto dealerships, aiming to enhance customer engagement, satisfaction, opportunity recovery, and revenue. This platform utilizes AI and conversational intelligence to optimize operations. The tool targets auto service centers within dealerships, crucial for their functioning. This innovation is slated to drive revenue acceleration and operational efficiency, offering advanced insights and support for customer interactions.

news.headline: Greenlane partners with Volvo to enhance electric vehicle charging for fleets, becoming Volvo's first CPO in North America.
news.summary: In Santa Monica, California, Greenlane Infrastructure, LLC has teamed up with Volvo Trucks North America to enhance access to heavy-duty electric vehicle (HDEV) charging. As a top commercial EV charging network developer, Greenlane is now Volvo's inaugural Charge Point Operator (CPO) in the North American market. This partnership aims to integrate Greenlane's charging network with Volvo's Open Charge service, ensuring improved convenience for fleets and drivers. This collaboration signifies a major step forward in expanding electric vehicle infrastructure for heavy-duty vehicles.

news.headline: Tesla: Ramp of new Model Y continues to go well. $TSLA
Get unbeatable value at Fazoli’s with a $3.99 pasta deal. Save big on delicious meals.
Polyrizon Ltd. (Nasdaq: PLRZ) partners with top branding firm for strategic development in biotech sector.
news.summary: A company based in Raanana, Israel, named Polyrizon Ltd. (Nasdaq: PLRZ), revealed on April 02, 2025, that it has partnered with a well-known branding and trademark consultancy firm on a global scale. The consultancy firm is highly esteemed for its collaborations with top pharmaceutical and medical device enterprises around the world.

news.headline: Fiber Broadband Association announces June 4 State Broadband Summit at Fiber Connect 2025 to discuss state-level broadband policy impact.
news.summary: In Washington, the Fiber Broadband Association (FBA) revealed that The State Broadband Summit is set to take place at Fiber Connect on June 4. This summit will delve into the effects of broadband policy on a state level, particularly how it relates to the NTIA BEAD program as state broadband offices commence practical implementation. The State Broadband Summit, happening at Fiber Connect 2025, aims to convene the full spectrum of the fiber broadband sector to strategize on the way forward. Its focus is to dispel misunderstandings, tackle prevalent issues, and foster collaboration within the industry.

news.headline: Tesla 1Q deliveries 336,681, est. 390,343 $TSLA
SAS Global Academic Programs awards honor educators for achievements in data and AI. Recognizes recipients of 2025 Educator Award for dedication and leadership.
news.summary: CARY, North Carolina, April 2, 2025 - A global leader in data and AI, SAS, has announced the winners of the 2025 SAS Educator Award. This prestigious award is designated to educators who have demonstrated remarkable commitment to their students and displayed exemplary leadership in the field. The recipients are recognized for their outstanding contributions to the education sector, with a focus on data and AI. The award celebrates their significant efforts in shaping the next generation of professionals in this industry.

news.headline: Pulmuone celebrates Earth Month with limited-edition packaging for core brands like Nasoya, promoting plant-based proteins.
news.summary: A prominent tofu manufacturer in America is urging customers to incorporate plant-based proteins into their diet in April. Pulmuone, the world's largest tofu producer and creator of popular brands Nasoya, is promoting this initiative in honor of Earth Month. The company is based in AYER, Mass. and FULLERTON, Calif. The announcement was made on April 2, 2025, through PRNewswire. Pulmuone's products are renowned across the nation and globally, encouraging individuals to opt for sustainable and healthy alternatives.

news.headline: Dreame launches R10 Pure cordless vacuum under $200 - powerful, modern design for small spaces.
news.summary: Introducing the R10 Pure, a cordless vacuum from Dreame Technology offering outstanding power, sleek design, and high-quality cleaning at a budget-friendly price. The latest innovation from the smart home cleaning pioneer is tailored for small spaces. The official launch took place in New York on April 2, 2025.

news.headline: Colleen Rothschild Beauty's Bio-Azure Replenishing Oil wins Best Hydrating Face Oil in 2025 NewBeauty Awards.
news.summary: In Dallas on April 2, 2025, Colleen Rothschild Beauty revealed that their top-selling Bio-Azure Replenishing Oil was named the Best Hydrating Face Oil in the 2025 NewBeauty Awards. This recognition, a highly esteemed honor in the beauty sector, highlights the oil's exceptional hydrating properties.

news.headline: Vail Resorts named one of America's Most Trustworthy Companies by Newsweek for 3rd year, based on survey of 25,000 respondents.
news.summary: In Broomfield, Colorado, Vail Resorts (NYSE: MTN) has been named one of America's Most Trustworthy Companies by Newsweek for the third year in a row. The recognition for 2025 stems from a survey of over 25,000 U.S. participants. This acknowledgment highlights the company's commitment to trustworthiness and reliability.
